data.title: Mountain Province Diamonds Announces Full Year and Fourth Quarter 2025 Results
data.description: Mountain Province Diamonds Inc. (TSX: MPVD) (OTC: MPVD) revealed its financial and operational performance for the fourth quarter of 2025 (Q4 2025) and the full year. The company shared this information on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Rinnai America Corporation Promotes Perry McGuire to Senior Vice President, Legal, Government Affairs & People
data.description: Peachtree City, Georgia - On March 31, 2026, Rinnai America Corporation disclosed the advancement of Perry McGuire to the role of Senior Vice President overseeing Legal, Government Affairs, and People. The company, renowned for its energy-efficient water heating and home comfort products, made this announcement.

data.title: Bitfarms' loss surged to $285M amid Bitcoin drop, but shares rise. Transition from mining to HPC and AI ongoing.
data.description: Bitfarms reported feeling the effects of a decrease in Bitcoin value during the previous year. The company is currently five months into its transition from Bitcoin mining to focusing on HPC and AI technologies.

data.title: Solana DEX volumes hit lowest since 2024. Will SOL maintain $80 support? Chance of price drop to $75, yet DApp revenue shows resilience.
data.description: The decreasing DEX volumes on Solana suggest a potential correction in SOL's price to $75, while the network's DApp revenue showcases its robustness.
